infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Thuto AI uses the microphone for voice-based learning interactions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Thuto AI uses the camera for interactive learning exercises.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Thuto AI uses your location to personalize regional learning content.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Thuto AI uses your location in the background for contextual learning reminders.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Thuto AI accesses your photo library for learning material uploads.
